<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a lava cell, so I must not move forward. The left side is also blocked by unknown/wall area, while the right side is open floor, so rotating clockwise is the safest way to navigate around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward and the cell in front of me is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The right side is blocked by a wall, and the left side is open floor, so I should turn counter-clockwise to face the safe path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is lava, so I should not move forward. The left side is also blocked by the wall column, while the right side is open floor. I will turn clockwise to face the safe open area.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

<action>
GIRA_HORARIO

<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly ahead is a lava cell, so I must not move forward. The safe open path is to my left, so I will rotate counter-clockwise to face it.

<thought>
